    <test_case id="1">
        <description>Test reparameterize_path on MemoizePath with a simple parameterized nested loop join, exercising the fix where subpath is recursively reparameterized.</description>
        <sql>
-- Setup
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1 CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t2 CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE t1 (a int, b int);
CREATE TABLE t2 (c int, d int);
INSERT INTO t1 SELECT generate_series(1,100), generate_series(1,100);
INSERT INTO t2 SELECT generate_series(1,100), generate_series(1,100);
ANALYZE t1, t2;

-- Execution: Force a parameterized nested loop join that may use Memoize
SET enable_hashjoin = off;
SET enable_mergejoin = off;
SET enable_nestloop = on;
EXPLAIN (COSTS OFF) SELECT * FROM t1, t2 WHERE t1.a = t2.c AND t1.b = 1;
SELECT * FROM t1, t2 WHERE t1.a = t2.c AND t1.b = 1;

-- Teardown
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1 CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t2 CASCADE;
RESET enable_hashjoin;
RESET enable_mergejoin;
RESET enable_nestloop;
        </sql>
    </test_case>

DROP AGGREGATE IF EXISTS agg122_final(text);
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS agg122_sfunc(text, text);
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS agg122_finalfn(text);
CREATE FUNCTION agg122_sfunc(state text, val text) RETURNS text LANGUAGE sql AS $$
  SELECT coalesce(state, '') || coalesce(val, '')
$$;
CREATE FUNCTION agg122_finalfn(state text) RETURNS text LANGUAGE sql AS $$
  SELECT coalesce(state, '<null>')
$$;

  SFUNC = agg122_sfunc,
  STYPE = text,
  FINALFUNC = agg122_finalfn
);

SELECT agg122_final(v) FROM (SELECT NULL::text AS v WHERE false) s;

DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS agg122_finalfn(text);

        <sql>
DROP EVENT TRIGGER IF EXISTS evt136_report_end;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS evt136_report_end();
DROP OPERATOR CLASS IF EXISTS evt136_opclass USING btree CASCADE;
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION evt136_report_end()
 RETURNS event_trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $$
DECLARE r RECORD;
BEGIN
    FOR r IN SELECT * FROM pg_event_trigger_ddl_commands()
    LOOP
        RAISE NOTICE 'END: command_tag=% type=% identity=%',
            r.command_tag, r.object_type, r.object_identity;
    END LOOP;
END; $$;
CREATE EVENT TRIGGER evt136_report_end ON ddl_command_end
  EXECUTE PROCEDURE evt136_report_end();
CREATE OPERATOR CLASS evt136_opclass FOR TYPE int USING btree AS STORAGE int;
DROP EVENT TRIGGER IF EXISTS evt136_report_end;
DROP OPERATOR CLASS IF EXISTS evt136_opclass USING btree CASCADE;
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS evt136_report_end();

        <sql>
